svg.text: RP2350 firmware · per src/*.c module · arrows = #include dependency
Core0 loop · Core1 launch · state machine · handle_core{0,1}_notify
Core 0: audio, mic, gui, opus_stream, tts_play_pump
Core 1: http, wifi, tts_forward_pump, linephone POST/GET
Shared: ic_ring (SPSC per direction, no mutex)
External: libopus, lwIP, mbedTLS, cJSON, btstack
